basic_details.job_title: Ministry of Civil Aviation Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 32 years

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Technology/Engineering (IT/CS/Cyber Security/Electronics/Communication) or M.Tech/MCA in relevant fields, along with a Cyber Security certificate (CEH/CISSP/CISA/OSCP) or Diploma. Minimum 2 years of experience in Cyber Security.
qualification.details: Young Professional: Bachelor degree in Technology or Engineering or equivalent in the field of Information Technology/ Computer Science/ Cyber security/ Electronics and Communication. M.Tech in the field in Information Technology/ Computer Science/ Cyber security/ Electronics and Communication/ MCA degree. Any certificate related to Cyber security: CEH/CISSP/CISA/ OSCP or Diploma in Cyber security. Minimum 2 years experience in the required domain field in areas of Cyber Security.

salary_details.details: Consolidated remuneration of Rs. 75,000/- per month (all inclusive).

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Ministry of Civil Aviation Young Professional Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Ministry of Civil Aviation Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Young Professional post is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor's degree in Technology/Engineering (IT/CS/Cyber Security/Electronics/Communication) or M.Tech/MCA, along with a Cyber Security certificate or diploma and at least 2 years of experience in Cyber Security.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Young Professional position?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is between 21 and 32 years as of the application deadline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated remuneration of Rs. 75,000/- per month, which is all-inclusive.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Ministry of Civil Aviation Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications can be submitted via email or post. You need to send your CV in the prescribed format to the address mentioned in the notification or to the given email address.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the employment for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: The engagement for the Young Professional post is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy announced for the Young Professional position in the Ministry of Civil Aviation.

faq.question: Q9. What is the experience required for the Young Professional role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 2 years of experience in the domain field, specifically in areas of Cyber Security, is required.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the application form?
faq.answer: The application form is expected to be available for download from the official website of the Ministry of Civil Aviation, as indicated in the 'How to Apply' section.
